/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libvision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libvision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/drone_diff__description.c.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/drone_diff__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/drone_diff__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/gimbal_info__description.c.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/gimbal_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vision_detector/msg/detail/gimbal_info__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
